reasoning: The control 'Secure Systems Architecture and Engineering Principles' focuses on ensuring secure design and implementation across various domains. In Kubernetes, this translates to enforcing least privilege through RBAC, securing network access with NetworkPolicies, ensuring secrets are encrypted at rest, and maintaining audit logs for traceability. These checks align with the principles of secure architecture and engineering by ensuring access control, network security, data protection, and accountability.
title: Secure Systems Architecture and Engineering Principles
